zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock是Baron Robert Boyd的兒子，於大約1299年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。他於1323年與Faith or Alice Fleming在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾馬丁享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Archer"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin an occupational name for a bowman (Old French arch(i)er, from Latin arc(u)arius, a derivative of arcus ‘bow’). In Australia it may sometimes have been chosen as a given name in tribute to the seven Archer brothers ( Charles , John , David , William , Archibald , Thomas , and Colin ) who were well-known pastoralists and explorers in 19th-century Queensland.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock was born about 1299, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Baron Robert Boyd. He married Faith or Alice Fleming in 1323, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1365, in Kilmartin, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

Il a épousé Faith or Alice Fleming en 1323, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1365, à Kilmartin, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnockは約1299年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックでBaron Robert Boydの息子として生まれた。1323年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでFaith or Alice Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルマルティンで67歳で死去した。

ko.Kilmartin, Argyll, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬마틴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock(은)는 대략 1299년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 Baron Robert Boyd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1323년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Faith or Alice Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬마틴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Faith or Alice Fleming в 1323 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности килмартинь, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
